title: Uncertainty Is a Design Input
prompt: Ask what assumptions, scenarios, time horizons, spatial scales, and uncertainty bands shape the result.

title: Sensor Coverage Is Not Reality
prompt: Review which places, assets, communities, hazards, and failures are invisible or undermeasured.

title: Resilience Is Public Governance
prompt: Check whether the model supports safety, equity, public value, human override, emergency action, and stop authority.
